option.title: Steam API Key
option.explain: Your Steam Web API key. Obtain one from https://steamcommunity.com/dev/apikey

option.title: Bot User ID
option.explain: The XenForo user ID of the account that will post VAC check results in each enlistment thread. Set to 0 to disable posting (results will only be logged).

option.title: Enlistment Node ID
option.explain: The forum node ID where enlistment applications are posted. New threads created in this node will trigger a Steam VAC check. Default: 325.
